entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan, the crop studied for pod characteristics and pest infestation

entities.name: CALLOSOBRUCHUS CHINENSIS
entities.description: A pest that infests pigeonpea pods

entities.name: POD HAIR DENSITY
entities.description: The density of hairs on the pigeonpea pod, acting as a barrier to pests

entities.name: POD WALL THICKNESS
entities.description: The thickness of the pigeonpea pod wall, providing resistance to larval penetration and adult emergence

entities.name: INFESTATION
entities.description: The state of pigeonpea pods being attacked by Callosobruchus chinensis

entities.name: SHATTERING
entities.description: Damage to pods through shattering that increases susceptibility to infestation

entities.name: POD BORERS
entities.description: Pests that cause prior damage to pods, increasing infestation by C. chinensis

entities.name: OVIPOSITION
entities.description: The process of egg-laying by Callosobruchus chinensis

entities.name: LARVAL PENETRATION
entities.description: The process of larvae entering the pigeonpea pod

entities.name: ADULT EMERGENCE
entities.description: The process of adult pests emerging from the pod

entities.name: PIGEONPEA SELECTION
entities.description: The process of screening pigeonpea genotypes for traits like pod hair density and wall thickness
